name: action-setup-authentik
description: Sets up an authentik test environment

scripts.build:main: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.js
scripts.build:post: esbuild src/post.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/post.js
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:post
scripts.all: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
